findings.message: is rendered without an alt attribute, so it has no accessible name. Screen readers cannot describe the image, violating WCAG 2.1 SC 1.1.1 (Non-text Content).
findings.suggestion: Add a descriptive alt attribute (e.g. alt="Items catalogue banner"), or alt="" if the image is purely decorative so assistive tech can skip it.
